goals.description: Finish and send the confirmation text to cohort_3 to seal the dinner plan.
goals.rationale: The message got cut off, and leaving it incomplete feels like a breach of trust that could create friction. Since I value our connection with them above all else, I need to complete this low-friction action immediately to reassure them I'm committed. My affiliation drive overrides the need to finish the term project right now; preserving the group dynamic is more important than immediate task completion.

I will defer this to protect my emotional bandwidth for the relationship that matters most.
